content_description: Create cinematic short-form videos of fictional moments captured on camera. Focus on lost footage, alternate realities, unexplained events, impossible discoveries, and unbelievable scenes presented as authentic archival recordings. Make every video feel mysterious, realistic, and instantly captivating.
style_targets: Documentary-style realism, handheld camera movement, authentic found footage aesthetics, natural lighting, subtle film grain, realistic imperfections, immersive environmental details, and cinematic color grading. Strong visual hooks in the first few seconds, believable reactions, and framing that feels captured rather than staged. The overall mood should evoke curiosity, mystery, and the feeling of uncovering hidden footage from another reality.
